properties.title: Israeli raid targets Beirut's southern suburb(about 10:10 local time)
According to "Lebanon Debate": The latest Israeli raid on the southern suburbs targeted the Faculty of Sciences at the Lebanese University, and there are reports of two dead.
Israeli airstrike targets Burj Qalawiya town
Lebanese Ministry of Health: 12 dead and 28 wounded in the Israeli raid that targeted the Ramlet al-Bayda area in Beirut at dawn
Moments of intense airstrikes targeting sites in the city of Ahvaz in Khuzestan province, southwestern Iran
An Iraqi security source: Two drones targeted the headquarters of the engineering battalion of the 14th Division of the Iraqi Army in Makhmur.
Multiple airstrikes targeted Saqer Camp that hosts PMF militias, southern Baghdad.  The Camp was targeted multiple times by the Israeli Airforce in the recent years

The Israeli army issues an evacuation warning for a building in central Beirut, ahead of an airstrike against Hezbollah. "Urgent warning to the residents of Beirut, specifically the Bashoura neighborhood"
Israeli aircraft launch an airstrike on the town of Frun and two airstrikes on the town of Majdal Selm
A warning raid targeted the Lebanese University - Faculty of Sciences
Raid targeting Majdal Silm
Lebanese Ministry of Health: 5 victims in the final toll of the Israeli raid on Aramoun, Aley district
A warning airstrike targeted Laylaki in Beirut's southern suburbs.
Iraqi Shia militias were targeted by an airstrike (likely drone) in Makhmour, approximately 60 km southwest of Erbil. The militias have been using the area to launch drone attacks against Erbil
Israeli airstrike targets town of Adshit
Aircraft launch raid between the towns of Al-Haniyah and Al-Mansouri, southern Lebanon
Israeli airstrike targets the town of Qalila
Airstrike targets southern town of Khiam
One dead and two wounded in the raid on the outskirts of Dours, near Ain Bourdai

At night, Russia attacked a transformer substation in the Kyiv district of Kharkiv, - Mayor Terekhov. Part of the city was left without electricity, power workers have already partially restored power supply. After the first hit, there was a second strike.
Hezbollah: We targeted the air defense system surrounding the city of Caesarea with a barrage of sophisticated missiles.
Image of an aircraft carrying out an airstrike on the town of Houmine in southern Lebanon

The Iraqi Popular Mobilization Forces (PMF) say 32 US airstrikes have targeted its headquarters across Diyala, Kirkuk, Anbar, Nineveh, Salahaddin, Wasit, and Babil since early March, leaving 27 fighters killed and 50 wounded, including 9 dead and 10 injured today.
Aircraft launch raid on the town of Al-Haniyah in the Tyre district of southern Lebanon
Airstrike on the town of Aitaroun and artillery shelling of Aita al-Shaab and Ramiya
Italian Defense Minister: The airstrike on the Italian base in Iraq was deliberate.
Explosion again over Erbil

Statement issued by the Popular Mobilization Forces:  The Popular Mobilization Forces express their categorical rejection and strong condemnation of the heinous airstrikes that targeted their official headquarters in a number of Iraqi provinces, carried out by American aircraft, in a blatant act of
properties.scrub_note: PMF statement blaming US aircraft for multiple strikes is an aggregate report.

properties.title: The town of Taybeh in southern Lebanon was targeted with more than 20 shells, coinciding with three airstrikes.
One dead so far in the raid on Ain Bourdai in Baalbek
The family of Iranian leader Ali Zadeh was killed in an airstrike on the capital, Tehran.
Heavy airstrikes on Aridh Dabin, Qabrikha and Taybeh

UNIFIL Press Statement. UNIFIL expresses its deep concern over the dangerous escalation of hostilities along the Blue Line last night. The peacekeepers observed the firing of more than 120 projectiles from Lebanese territory towards Israel, as well as seven Israeli airstrikes
properties.scrub_note: UNIFIL observed >120 projectiles fired from Lebanon into Israel; minimum count recorded for Hezbollah barrage.

properties.title: Airstrike targeted the outskirts of the towns of Haris and Kafr
Casualties in airstrikes on residential areas in Ahvaz
Air raid on the area between Alma al-Shaab and Naqoura, South Lebanon
Israeli raid on Wadi Hamoul, located between Naqoura and Tyre Harfa in southern Lebanon
Airstrikes targeted the town of Naqoura and another targeted the town of Taybeh
A drone strike on Deir Antar resulted in one person killed
The army imposed a security cordon around the site of the Israeli raid in Ramlet al-Bayda.
Israeli airstrike targets Yater town in the south
Two airstrikes target the threatened building in Qasr Naba
Lebanon: 27 dead in Israeli raids on Beirut and the southern suburbs of Beirut
Seven people were killed and 21 injured in an Israeli airstrike on the Ramlet al-Bayda area of Beirut.
One person killed and others injured in Israeli drone strikes on the city of Fardis in Alborz province
The Lebanese army is working to evacuate the Ramlet al-Bayda area after it was discovered that there was an unexploded missile at the site of the airstrike.
Iranian media: Air base in Shiraz, southern Iran, targeted twice this morning
The Iranian army: In the past few hours, we targeted targets at the Palmachim and Ovadia airbases and the Shin Bet headquarters in Israel with attack drones.
An Israeli airstrike targeted a Civil Defense vehicle belonging to the Islamic Health Authority in Tamriya, on the outskirts of the town of Tulin, resulting in injuries.
American-Israeli airstrikes in the industrial area in northern Tehran today.
An Israeli drone strike targeted the outskirts of the town of Toulene in southern Lebanon.
Iranian missiles being intercepted over Jerusalem
Israeli warplanes launched a raid on Qaqaiyat al-Jisr
Saudi Arabia Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: A drone was intercepted and destroyed in the Empty Quarter, heading towards the Shaybah oil field.
Fires at the Tikhoretska pumping station in Krasnodar Krai
Bahrain says fuel tanks attacked, requests residents stay home
properties.scrub_note: Fuel tanks in Bahrain were attacked; Gulf-state strikes are attributed to Iran.
